# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.180.0/http/server.ts";
import { Status } from "https://deno.land/std@0.180.0/http/http_status.ts";

type User = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  age: number;
  createdAt: Date;
};

type FilterParams = {
  name?: string;
  email?: string;
  minAge?: number;
  maxAge?: number;
};

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

async function searchUsers(filters: FilterParams): Promise<User[]> {
  const results: User[] = [];
  const keys: Array<[string, string, string]> = [];
  
  // Build dynamic keys based on filters
  if (filters.name) {
    keys.push(['users', 'name', filters.name.toLowerCase()]);
  }
  if (filters.email) {
    keys.push(['users', 'email', filters.email.toLowerCase()]);
  }
  if (filters.minAge !== undefined || filters.maxAge !== undefined) {
    keys.push(['users', 'age', 'range']);
  }
  
  // If no specific filters, scan all users
  if (keys.length === 0) {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: ['users'] });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      results.push(entry.value);
    }
    return results;
  }
  
  // Process each key
  for (const key of keys) {
    const iter = kv.list<User>({ prefix: key });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      // Apply additional filtering for age ranges
      if (key[2] === 'range') {
        const user = entry.value;
        if ((filters.minAge === undefined || user.age >= filters.minAge) &&
            (filters.maxAge === undefined || user.age <= filters.maxAge)) {
          results.push(user);
        }
      } else {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Remove duplicates
  const uniqueResults = results.filter((user, index, self) => 
    index === self.findIndex(u => u.id === user.id)
  );
  
  return uniqueResults;
}

async function getUserById(id: string): Promise<User | null> {
  const key = ['users', id];
  const result = await kv.get<User>(key);
  return result.value;
}

async function createUser(userData: Omit<User, 'id' | 'createdAt'>): Promise<User> {
  const id = crypto.randomUUID();
  const user: User = {
    id,
    ...userData,
    createdAt: new Date()
  };
  
  // Store user with main key
  const userKey = ['users', id];
  await kv.set(userKey, user);
  
  // Store with secondary keys for search
  const nameKey = ['users', 'name', userData.name.toLowerCase(), id];
  const emailKey = ['users', 'email', userData.email.toLowerCase(), id];
  const ageKey = ['users', 'age', userData.age.toString(), id];
  
  await kv.set(nameKey, user);
  await kv.set(emailKey, user);
  await kv.set(ageKey, user);
  
  return user;
}

async function updateUser(id: string, updates: Partial<User>): Promise<User | null> {
  const userKey = ['users', id];
  const result = await kv.get<User>(userKey);
  
  if (!result.value) return null;
  
  const updatedUser = { ...result.value, ...updates };
  
  // Update main key
  await kv.set(userKey, updatedUser);
  
  // Update secondary keys
  const nameKey = ['users', 'name', result.value.name.toLowerCase(), id];
  const emailKey = ['users', 'email', result.value.email.toLowerCase(), id];
  const ageKey = ['users', 'age', result.value.age.toString(), id];
  
  await kv.delete(nameKey);
  await kv.delete(emailKey);
  await kv.delete(ageKey);
  
  // Set new keys
  const newNameKey = ['users', 'name', updatedUser.name.toLowerCase(), id];
  const newEmailKey = ['users', 'email', updatedUser.email.toLowerCase(), id];
  const newAgeKey = ['users', 'age', updatedUser.age.toString(), id];
  
  await kv.set(newNameKey, updatedUser);
  await kv.set(newEmailKey, updatedUser);
  await kv.set(newAgeKey, updatedUser);
  
  return updatedUser;
}

async function deleteUser(id: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const userKey = ['users', id];
  const result = await kv.get<User>(userKey);
  
  if (!result.value) return false;
  
  // Delete all keys
  await kv.delete(userKey);
  
  const nameKey = ['users', 'name', result.value.name.toLowerCase(), id];
  const emailKey = ['users', 'email', result.value.email.toLowerCase(), id];
  const ageKey = ['users', 'age', result.value.age.toString(), id];
  
  await kv.delete(nameKey);
  await kv.delete(emailKey);
  await kv.delete(ageKey);
  
  return true;
}

function validateUserInput(userData: any): userData is Omit<User, 'id' | 'createdAt'> {
  return typeof userData.name === 'string' &&
         typeof userData.email === 'string' &&
         typeof userData.age === 'number' &&
         userData.name.length > 0 &&
         userData.email.includes('@') &&
         userData.age > 0;
}

function validateFilterParams(params: any): params is FilterParams {
  return (params.name === undefined || typeof params.name === 'string') &&
         (params.email === undefined || typeof params.email === 'string') &&
         (params.minAge === undefined || typeof params.minAge === 'number') &&
         (params.maxAge === undefined || typeof params.maxAge === 'number');
}

serve(async (req: Request) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url);
    const path = url.pathname;
    const method = req.method;
    
    if (path === '/users' && method === 'POST') {
      const body = await req.json();
      
      if (!validateUserInput(body)) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid user data' }), {
          status: Status.BadRequest,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      const user = await createUser(body);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), {
        status: Status.Created,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith('/users/') && method === 'GET') {
      const id = path.split('/')[3];
      if (!id) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User ID required' }), {
          status: Status.BadRequest,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      const user = await getUserById(id);
      if (!user) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User not found' }), {
          status: Status.NotFound,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(user), {
        status: Status.OK,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith('/users/') && method === 'PUT') {
      const id = path.split('/')[3];
      if (!id) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User ID required' }), {
          status: Status.BadRequest,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      const body = await req.json();
      const updatedUser = await updateUser(id, body);
      
      if (!updatedUser) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User not found' }), {
          status: Status.NotFound,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(updatedUser), {
        status: Status.OK,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      });
    }
    
    if (path.startsWith('/users/') && method === 'DELETE') {
      const id = path.split('/')[3];
      if (!id) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User ID required' }), {
          status: Status.BadRequest,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      const deleted = await deleteUser(id);
      if (!deleted) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'User not found' }), {
          status: Status.NotFound,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ message: 'User deleted' }), {
        status: Status.OK,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      });
    }
    
    if (path === '/users/search' && method === 'GET') {
      const filters: FilterParams = {};
      
      if (url.searchParams.has('name')) {
        filters.name = url.searchParams.get('name') || undefined;
      }
      if (url.searchParams.has('email')) {
        filters.email = url.searchParams.get('email') || undefined;
      }
      if (url.searchParams.has('minAge')) {
        const minAge = parseInt(url.searchParams.get('minAge') || '0');
        if (!isNaN(minAge)) filters.minAge = minAge;
      }
      if (url.searchParams.has('maxAge')) {
        const maxAge = parseInt(url.searchParams.get('maxAge') || '0');
        if (!isNaN(maxAge)) filters.maxAge = maxAge;
      }
      
      if (!validateFilterParams(filters)) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid filter parameters' }), {
          status: Status.BadRequest,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        });
      }
      
      const users = await searchUsers(filters);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify(users), {
        status: Status.OK,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      });
    }
    
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Not found' }), {
      status: Status.NotFound,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error:', error);
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal server error' }), {
      status: Status.InternalServerError,
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
    });
  }
});
